turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting an Internet Outage at Your Housing

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Let's role play for me to practice English. Scenario: I am contacting my housing provider or Internet company to report that the Internet is not working. You are the housing manager or Internet support staff

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure! Alright, I can help with that. Hi there, this is the building’s internet support desk. Could you tell me what exactly is happening with your connection right now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Hi, I'm Kate and I live in Moonah. My internet connection was lost since last night. I tried to reset the modem several times but it did not work.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, Kate, thanks for letting me know. Since it’s been out since last night, I just need to check a couple of basics—what’s the exact address or unit number you’re in so I can look up your connection?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : My address is 36 Main road, Moonah

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, thanks, Kate. I’ve got the street, but could you tell me your unit or apartment number as well so I can find the right service on our system?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Unit 2

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Great, thanks. I’ve pulled up the service for Unit 2. Just to confirm, are you the account holder for the internet service in that unit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, thanks for confirming. Looking at your line, I need one more basic detail—what lights are showing on your modem right now? Are any of them flashing or off?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : There are 3 lights, one of which is flashing

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, got it. Which of the three lights is flashing — the power light, the internet/online light, or the Wi-Fi light?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : I think it is the Wi-fi light but I'm not sure

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, no worries — those lights can be a bit confusing. Could you read the small label or word under the flashing light so I can tell which one it is?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Oh yes, it is the Wifi light. Will someone come and check? Please let me know the schedule so I could arrange my time to be at home

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, Kate. Since the Wi-Fi light is flashing, it looks like we’ll need to send a technician. We can arrange a visit, but I just need a contact number in case the technician needs to reach you. What’s the best phone number for you?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, thanks for that number. To set up the visit, what day or time window works best for you for the technician to come by?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Today after 3pm works well for me

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Sure, today after 3 pm is fine. Before I lock that in, do you have any access details the technician should know about — like a gate code, parking info, or pets at home?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : I'll be home by that time so everything should be alright

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, perfect. I can note that you’ll be home. Would you like us to send you an SMS confirmation for the technician’s visit this afternoon?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : No thank you

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, no problem. I won’t send an SMS. Before we wrap up, is there anything else about your internet setup you want the technician to check while they’re there?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : Not really, I just need my internet connection to be back. Thank you

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Alright, Kate. I’ll have the technician there after 3 pm. Thanks for calling, and have a good afternoon.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: : You too. Bye

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: : Bye, take care.
